channel.title: Noah Hailegiorgis
channel.description: Automation engineer. Founder of ClickedTools, creator of ShaderDojo.

item.title: Closing the Lead-to-Bind Gap: AI Document Processing Across Six Insurance Agencies
item.description: Document-processing pipelines for Archway Computers that read quotes, endorsements, policies, and forms across six insurance agencies, freeing producers from thousands of manual entries a month.

item.title: From Ticket to Answer in Under a Minute: An AI Support Knowledge Base
item.description: An AI knowledge base built from a CRM company's own tickets and docs that drafts grounded support replies for agents to approve in Helpwise.

item.title: Keeping Reps on Top of Every Relationship: Automation for a B2B Marketplace
item.description: A long-term technical partnership for a B2B vendor agency: relationship tracking, document ingestion, and a knowledge base.

item.title: 1,000 Emails a Day at a 2% Reply Rate: Automated Clay → Smartlead Outbound
item.description: A self-hosted n8n pipeline connecting Clay to Smartlead. Personalized cold outbound at up to 1,000 emails a day, reply rate lifted to 2%.

item.title: From 3.5 Hours a Day to 30 Minutes: AI Email Triage in Outlook
item.description: An AI-assisted Outlook workflow that cut a founder's inbox time from about 3.5 hours a day to roughly 30 minutes.

item.title: Front-Desk Support at $0.08 a Call: A 24/7 AI Voice Agent
item.description: A 24/7 AI voice agent that replaced front-desk booking and tier-1 support, at about $0.08 per call.

item.title: 10% More Sales in a Month: Custom n8n Enrichment for Enterprise Sales
item.description: A custom n8n enrichment pipeline that lifted enterprise sales 10% in the first month, at $0.06 per enriched lead.

item.title: My New Favorite Architecture: Using n8n as a Mid Server
item.description: Moving past an initial skepticism towards visual builders.

item.title: Great Software Engineers Build for a Lifetime
item.description: Building software with longevity — reusable systems and solid foundations — is how engineers truly grow.

item.title: Blazing Fast & Dirt Cheap: Nginx, Cloudflare, and a VPS
item.description: Get fast, cheap global hosting for your React or Vue app with a basic VPS, Nginx, and Cloudflare's free tier.
